metadata.title: Quick Side Peek Nails a Smooth Double Kill in VALORANT Mid Fight
metadata.description:
Watch this sharp side peek that surprises two enemies and turns the round around. Timing and calm aim made all the difference here. Where’s your favorite angle to catch foes off guard?

Drop your favorite quick peek plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps
